summary: Iteration 27: Tested the new Upselling Servizi feature. Backend APIs (GET /api/public/upselling, POST /api/public/appointments/{id}/add-service) are fully working. CMS Upselling tab in /gestione-sito is functional with discount input (15%) and existing rule for 'Taglio Donna'. Fixed a critical bug where booking form crashed when receiving 409 conflict response (object rendered as React child). Frontend booking flow with upselling suggestions needs further testing due to time slot conflicts.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>' - React hydration warning from dev tools, not affecting functionality

1. GET /api/public/upselling?service_ids=7188fb89-... returns 2 suggestions with 15% discount - PASS
2. GET /api/public/upselling with non-trigger service returns empty - PASS
3. GET /api/public/upselling with empty service_ids returns empty - PASS
4. Upselling discount is correctly 15% - PASS
5. POST /api/public/appointments/{id}/add-service adds service with discount - PASS
6. POST add-service with wrong phone returns 403 - PASS
7. POST add-service with invalid appointment returns 404 - PASS
8. POST add-service with missing fields returns 400 - PASS
9. GET /api/website/config includes upselling_rules and upselling_discount - PASS
10. Upselling rule structure is correct (trigger_service_id, suggested_service_ids, etc.) - PASS
11. GET /api/public/services returns services list with Taglio Donna - PASS

15. Discount input found with value 15 - PASS

19. '10 Laminazione - Ki Power' is checked with discounted price €17.00 - PASS

21. 'Salva Modifiche' button found - PASS

25. Client details form works - PASS
26. Conflict error message displays correctly (after fix) - PASS

bugs_fixed.issue: React crash when booking API returns 409 conflict - 'Objects are not valid as a React child'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed error handling to extract message from object response: if (detail && typeof detail === 'object' && detail.message) toast.error(detail.message)

action_items: Consider adding data-testid attributes to login form inputs for easier testing
The booking flow with upselling suggestions on confirmation page needs end-to-end testing with an available time slot
critical_code_review_comments: Upselling backend implementation is complete and well-structured
GET /api/public/upselling correctly filters suggestions based on trigger service
POST /api/public/appointments/{id}/add-service correctly applies discount and updates appointment
CMS Upselling tab has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Discount calculation is correct: original_price * (1 - discount/100)
Fixed: BookingPage.jsx error handling for 409 conflict response

success_rate.frontend: 90% (CMS tab working, booking flow partially tested)

seed_data_creation: Created test appointments with upselling services via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified the Upselling Servizi feature. Backend APIs are fully working. CMS Upselling tab at /gestione-sito shows: discount input (15%), existing rule for 'Taglio Donna' with suggestions '08 Maschera curativa' and '10 Laminazione - Ki Power'. A bug was fixed in BookingPage.jsx where 409 conflict responses crashed the app. The booking confirmation page with upselling suggestions needs testing with an available time slot.

endpoints.GET /api/public/upselling: Returns suggestions with discount for trigger services
endpoints.POST /api/public/appointments/{id}/add-s: Adds upselling service with discount to appointment

booking_confirmation_upselling.note: Upselling suggestions should appear on confirmation page after successful booking with trigger service
